sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Israel Mite A Teelna

verses.text: Kei, Khrih tawh kipawl ka hih manin zuauthu ka gen thei kei hi. Kha Siangtho lamlahna tawh, ka lungsim kitheihna-ah zuaugen hetloin a mantakin ka gen thu in
Leitung silesa-ah ka mipihte-a' dingin nakpi takin dahin ka lunggimna a khang hi
Hi thei ding hi leh amaute' hoihna dingin keimah in Pasian' samsiatna thuakin Khrih tawh kikhenna ding ciangdong nangawnin amaute ka huhnuam hi
Amaute pen Pasian' teel Israel mite hi a, Pasian in ama ta-in bawlin a minthan'na a hopte, amaute tungah thuciamna bawlin Thukham a piakte, a man taktakin biaktheihna nei-in thuciamna a ngahte

leh a thupi pupite' suanlekhakte hi uh a, leitung silesa tawh kisai-in Khrih zong amau minam sung panin a piang ahi hi. Hih thute hangin mi khempeuh in na khempeuh a uk Pasian phat tawntung ta uh hen! Amen
Ahi zongin Pasian' thuciamnate a mawkna a suak hi samlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh Pasian' teel mi hi khinlo hi
Abraham' suanlekhak khempeuh zong Pasian' tate hi kimlo hi. Pasian in Abraham kiangah, “Na ta Isaac' suanlekhakte bek nangma suanlekhakin kisim ding hi,” ci hi
Tua ahih manin leitung ngeina tawh a suak tate pen Pasian' ta hilo a, Pasian' thuciamna tawh kizui-a a suakte bek suanlekhak taktakin a kisim pan hizaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in hih bangin thuciamna bawl a, “A hun a tun' ciangin kong paikik ding a, Sarah in tapa khat a nei ding hi,” ci hi
Tua bek zong hilo lai hi. Rebekah in eite' pupi Isaac tawh tapa nih nei hi
Pasian' teelna pen a teel mite' nasepna hang hiloin Pasian' sapna tawh kisaizaw hi, ci-in a kilatna dingin a tate a sia a pha a gamtat theihma, a suahma pek mahin
Rebekah kiangah Pasian in, “A uzaw in a nauzaw' na sem ding hi,” na ci khinzo hi
Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Jakob ka it a, Esau ka mudah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Tua bang ahih leh Pasian thutanglo hi, a kici thei ding hiam? Kici theilo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Ka hehpih nopte ka hehpih ding a, ka khasiat nopte ka khasiat ding hi,” ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite' utna leh sepna tawh kisailo a, Pasian' hehpihna bek tawh kisaizaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah Pasian in Faro kiangah, “Ka vangliatna lahna ding leh leitung khempeuhah ka min a kitheihna dingin kong zatnop manin kumpi a hong suaksak ka hi hi,” ci hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian in a hehpih nopte hehpih a, a paupeen'sak nopte paupeengsak hi
Note in, “Tua bang ahih leh bang hangin Pasian in mi mawhsak thei ahi hiam? Pasian' cihsa kua in kheelzo ding ahi hiam?” na cinuam khading uh hi
Lawmte aw, ahi zongin kua in Pasian' thu nialngam ding na hi uh hiam? Beel in amah a sekpa kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin hong sek na hi hiam?” ci ngeilo hi
Beelsekpa in tungman lomkhat sung panin hun thupi diakin zatding beel leh zat mawkmawk ding beelin a ututin sektheihna ding thu a nei hi
Tua mah bangin Pasian in zong a beisa hunah siatna a thuakdingin a kilawm mite susia loin a ki-ipipna mite tungah a hehna leh a vangliatna a lahtheihna ding thu a neih mah bangin
ama minthan'na a lahtheihna dingin ama minthan'na a ngahdingin a hong sehsa eite tungah zong ama hehpihna a hong piaktheihna ding thu a nei hi
Tua bangin a hong sap eite pen Jew mite sung bek pan hiloin Gentail mite sung panin zong ahi hi
Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keima mi a hilote, ‘Keima mi,’ ka ci ding a, ka itloh mite, ‘Ka itte,’ ka ci ding hi
‘Ka mite hi kei uh teh,’ a kicihna leitang teekteek mahah, ‘A nungta Pasian' tate na hi uh hi,’ kici ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Isaiah in Israel mite' thu a genna-ah, “Israel mite, tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hangin mi tawmno khat bek suakta ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitung mite thu hong khen baih ding hi,” ci hi
Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in, “Vanglian Topa in eite' suanlekhak ding hong sitsaklo hi leh Sodom khua leh Gomorrah khuamite i bang ding hi,” ci-in a genkholhsa thu ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Lungdamna Thu, Israel Mite-a' ding Zong Ahi Hi

verses.text: Tua ahih leh Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ding hanciamna a neilo Gentail mite pen upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawlthei a
Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna dingin thukham zuihna tawh hanciam napi-in a zuih zawhlohna hangun Israel mite kipawl theilo ahih leh a bangci thu ahi hiam
Amaute in upna suangloin nasepna a suan' hang uh ahi hi. Amaute pen Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin, “Pukna ding suang,” a kici tungah a pukkha uh ahi hi
Lai Siangtho in, “En un, keimah in Zion-ah mite a muktuk theihna ding, mite a puktheihna ding suang khat ka koih hi. Ahi zongin amah a muang mite khempeuh tavai cih om ngeilo ding hi,” ci hi.
